title: ‘Misplaced euphoria’: Markets are sleepwalking into a recession amid Iran war oil price shock
summary_full: As US equities hit fresh highs, strategists warn that investors are downplaying the impact of soaring oil prices.
summary_public: As US equities hit fresh highs, strategists warn that investors are downplaying the impact of soaring oil prices.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Markets are sleepwalking into a recession amid Iran war oil price shock
